actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (fileID 1865680029) on Room_Modern is treated as the exact component instance of the provided PlayQuickSound script (RequireComponent AudioSource). No m_Calls are present for automatic invocation. Manually invoke the public no-arg Play() to cover behavior: set randomized pitch within [-randomPitchVariance, +randomPitchVariance] around defaultPitch, play assigned AudioClip via AudioSource.PlayOneShot at 'volume', then reset pitch to default. OnValidate enforces audioSource.playOnAwake=false in editor.
